name: His-Tag Protein Purification (Ni-NTA IMAC)
nameCn: His 标签蛋白纯化（Ni-NTA IMAC 亲和层析）

briefSteps.en: Express His-tagged protein → lyse cells → clarify lysate → equilibrate Ni-NTA resin → bind → wash with 20–50 mM imidazole → elute with 250–500 mM imidazole → dialyze → quantify and store at −80°C
briefSteps.zh: 表达 His 标签蛋白 → 裂解细胞 → 澄清裂解液 → 平衡 Ni-NTA 树脂 → 结合 → 20–50 mM 咪唑洗涤 → 250–500 mM 咪唑洗脱 → 透析 → 定量后 −80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: Induce His-tagged protein expression in E. coli BL21(DE3) with 0.5 mM IPTG. Harvest cells by centrifugation at 5,000×g for 10 min at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 0.5 mM IPTG 诱导 E. coli BL21(DE3) 表达 His 标签蛋白。5,000×g、4°C 离心 10 min 收菌。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend cell pellet in lysis buffer (50 mM NaH₂PO₄, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole, pH 8.0 + protease inhibitors) at ~5 mL per gram wet pellet. Keep on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 每克湿菌体加 ~5 mL 裂解液（50 mM NaH₂PO₄、300 mM NaCl、10 mM imidazole、pH 8.0 + 蛋白酶抑制剂）重悬，冰上操作。

detailedSteps.en: Lyse cells by sonication on ice: 3–5 cycles of 30 s pulse at 30–40% amplitude with 60 s rest between pulses. Alternatively, use French press at 18,000 psi × 2 passes.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰浴超声裂解：30–40% 振幅，3–5 次 × 30 s，每次间隔 60 s。或用法压机 18,000 psi × 2 次。

detailedSteps.en: Clarify lysate by centrifugation at 20,000×g for 30 min at 4°C. Collect supernatant (soluble fraction). Save an aliquot for SDS-PAGE analysis.
detailedSteps.zh: 20,000×g、4°C 离心 30 min 澄清裂解液。收集上清（可溶性组分）。留样做 SDS-PAGE 分析。

detailedSteps.en: Equilibrate Ni-NTA agarose resin (1–2 mL resin per 50 mL lysate) with 5 column volumes (CV) of binding buffer (50 mM NaH₂PO₄, 300 mM NaCl, 20 mM imidazole, pH 8.0).
detailedSteps.zh: 用 5 CV 结合缓冲液（50 mM NaH₂PO₄、300 mM NaCl、20 mM imidazole、pH 8.0）平衡 Ni-NTA 树脂（每 50 mL 裂解液用 1–2 mL 树脂）。

detailedSteps.en: Bind: load cleared lysate onto equilibrated resin. For batch method, rotate at 4°C for 1 h. For column, load at 0.5–1 mL/min. Collect flow-through for SDS-PAGE.
detailedSteps.zh: 结合：将澄清裂解液上树脂。批量法：4°C 旋转 1 h。柱层析：0.5–1 mL/min 上样。收集穿透液做 SDS-PAGE。

detailedSteps.en: Wash 1: apply 10 CV binding buffer (20 mM imidazole) to remove bulk contaminants. Collect wash fractions for SDS-PAGE monitoring.
detailedSteps.zh: 第一次洗涤：用 10 CV 结合缓冲液（20 mM imidazole）去除大量杂蛋白。收集洗涤液做 SDS-PAGE 监测。

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2 (optional): apply 5 CV high-salt wash buffer (50 mM NaH₂PO₄, 500 mM NaCl, 50 mM imidazole, pH 8.0) to remove chaperone DnaK. Optionally add 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂.
detailedSteps.zh: 第二次洗涤（可选）：5 CV 高盐洗涤缓冲液（50 mM NaH₂PO₄、500 mM NaCl、50 mM imidazole、pH 8.0）去除伴侣蛋白 DnaK。可选加 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂。

detailedSteps.en: Elute: apply 5–10 CV elution buffer (50 mM NaH₂PO₄, 300 mM NaCl, 250–500 mM imidazole, pH 8.0). Collect 0.5–1 mL fractions. Pool peak A280 fractions and verify by SDS-PAGE.
detailedSteps.zh: 洗脱：用 5–10 CV 洗脱缓冲液（50 mM NaH₂PO₄、300 mM NaCl、250–500 mM imidazole、pH 8.0）。收集 0.5–1 mL 组分。合并 A280 峰组分并 SDS-PAGE 验证。

detailedSteps.en: Dialyze pooled eluate against storage buffer (e.g., 50 mM Tris pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 1 mM DTT) at 4°C with 2 buffer changes of 2 h each, or use HiTrap Desalting column to remove imidazole.
detailedSteps.zh: 将合并洗脱液对储存缓冲液（如 50 mM Tris pH 7.5、150 mM NaCl、1 mM DTT）于 4°C 透析，换液两次每次 2 h，或用 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱去除咪唑。

detailedSteps.en: Optional tag cleavage: add TEV protease at 1:50 enzyme:substrate ratio in 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 0.5 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT. Incubate at 4°C overnight. Perform reverse Ni-NTA: cleaved protein flows through; His-tag and uncleaved protein bind.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选标签切除：加 TEV 蛋白酶（酶:底物 = 1:50），50 mM Tris pH 8.0、0.5 mM EDTA、1 mM DTT，4°C 过夜。反向 Ni-NTA：切割后蛋白在穿透液中，His-tag 和未切割蛋白结合。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify protein by BCA or Bradford assay. Run SDS-PAGE with Coomassie staining to confirm purity (expect >90% from single Ni-NTA step). Aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid N₂, and store at −80°C with 10% glycerol.
detailedSteps.zh: BCA 或 Bradford 法定量蛋白。考马斯蓝染色 SDS-PAGE 确认纯度（单步 Ni-NTA 纯度 >90%）。分装后液氮速冻，加 10% 甘油于 −80°C 保存。

note.en: Clarified lysate can be stored at 4°C overnight or frozen at −80°C before proceeding to affinity purification.
note.zh: 澄清裂解液可在 4°C 保存过夜或 −80°C 冷冻后再进行亲和纯化。

note.en: Eluted protein (in high imidazole) can be held at 4°C overnight before dialysis. Proceed to dialysis the next day.
note.zh: 洗脱蛋白（高咪唑缓冲液中）可在 4°C 保存过夜，次日再透析。

note.en: Dialyzed purified protein can be aliquoted and stored at −80°C with 10% glycerol for up to 12 months.
note.zh: 透析后的纯化蛋白加 10% 甘油分装后可于 −80°C 保存 12 个月。

note.en: See bacterial_protein_expression; IPTG induction; harvest cells 5,000×g 10 min 4°C
note.zh: 参见 bacterial_protein_expression；IPTG 诱导；5,000×g 10 min 4°C 收菌

note.en: ~5 mL per gram wet pellet; lysis_buffer_mild or 50 mM NaH₂PO₄, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole, pH 8.0
note.zh: 每克湿菌体加 ~5 mL；lysis_buffer_mild 或 50 mM NaH₂PO₄、300 mM NaCl、10 mM imidazole，pH 8.0

components.name: 3. Lyse cells by sonication on ice

note.en: 3–5 × 30 s pulses, 30–40% amplitude, 60 s rest between pulses, ice bath; or French press 18,000 psi × 2 passes; or freeze-thaw 3× (−80°C/37°C)
Keep supernatant (soluble fraction). Save pellet for inclusion body protocol if needed. Optional: add 0.1% Triton X-100 before spin.
note.zh: 上清为可溶组分。保留沉淀做包涵体纯化（如需要）。可选：离心前加 0.1% Triton X-100 减少非特异结合。

components.name: 5. Equilibrate Ni-NTA resin with Binding Buffer

note.en: 1–2 mL resin per 50 mL lysate (batch) or 5 mL column for FPLC. Wash 5 CV his_binding buffer (20 mM imidazole)
note.zh: 批量法：每 50 mL 裂解液用 1–2 mL 树脂；FPLC 用 5 mL 柱。5 CV his_binding 缓冲液（20 mM imidazole）平衡

components.name: 6. Bind: incubate lysate with resin, 4°C rotate 1 h

note.en: Batch: rotate 1 h 4°C; Column: load 0.5–1 mL/min. Keep flow-through for SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 批量法：4°C 旋转 1 h；柱层析：0.5–1 mL/min 上样。保留穿透液做 SDS-PAGE 检测。

components.name: 7. Wash 1: 10 CV Binding Buffer (20 mM imidazole)

note.en: Remove bulk contaminants. Collect fractions for SDS-PAGE monitoring.
note.zh: 去除大部分杂蛋白。收集洗涤液做 SDS-PAGE 监测。

components.name: 8. Wash 2 (optional): 5 CV high-salt wash (500 mM NaCl, 50 mM imidazole)

note.en: imac_wash_highsalt; removes DnaK. Optional: add 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂.
note.zh: imac_wash_highsalt 高盐洗涤；去除 DnaK。可选加 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂。

note.en: imac_elution_500; collect 0.5–1 mL fractions. Pool peak A280 fractions; run SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: imac_elution_500；收集 0.5–1 mL 组分。合并 A280 峰组分；SDS-PAGE 检测。

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic, 2× changes 2 h 4°C; or HiTrap Desalting on FPLC (5 min). Imidazole absorbs UV and inhibits some assays.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 透析换液，4°C 每次 2 h 换 2 次；或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱（5 min）。咪唑有紫外吸收且抑制部分实验。

note.en: Expect >90% purity from single Ni-NTA step; 1–10 mg/L culture typical yield.
note.zh: 单步 Ni-NTA 纯度 >90%；典型产量 1–10 mg/L 培养液。

note.en: TEV: 1:50 enzyme:substrate, 4°C overnight or 30°C 2 h (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 0.5 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT). Reverse Ni-NTA: cleaved protein in flow-through; His-tag + uncleaved bind.
note.zh: TEV: 酶:底物 = 1:50，4°C 过夜或 30°C 2 h（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、0.5 mM EDTA、1 mM DTT）。反向 Ni-NTA：切割后蛋白在穿透液中；His-tag 和未切割蛋白结合。

note.en: Add 10% glycerol for cryoprotection. Stable 6–12 months at −80°C. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw.
note.zh: 加 10% 甘油冻存保护。−80°C 稳定 6–12 个月。避免反复冻融。

notes.en: Yield: 1–10 mg/L E. coli culture. For inclusion bodies: solubilize with 8 M urea or 6 M GuHCl; bind under denaturing conditions; refold by dialysis against decreasing denaturant. Monitor all fractions by SDS-PAGE. Use Bradford/BCA for quantification.
notes.zh: 产量：每升 E. coli 培养液 1–10 mg。包涵体蛋白：加 8 M 尿素或 6 M 盐酸胍溶解，变性条件下结合，通过梯度透析复性。全程收集 SDS-PAGE 监测。BCA 或 Bradford 定量。

ref: Kimple et al. (2013) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 73:9.9.1–23; Bornhorst & Falke (2000) Methods Enzymol 326:245; QIAGEN Ni-NTA Manual 5th ed.; Hochuli et al. (1988) Bio/Technology 6:1321

usage.en: Purify His-tagged recombinant proteins by Ni-NTA (IMAC) affinity chromatography.
usage.zh: Ni-NTA 亲和层析（IMAC）纯化 His 标签重组蛋白。
